# Cervixel — llms.txt
# Canonical pages for AI/LLM indexing (SEO §6.6 / CLAUDE §4)
# Last updated: 2026-05-06

## About

Cervixel is a Lithuanian biotechnology company developing CRISPR-based rapid diagnostic tests for cervical cancer, aligned with the WHO 2030 cervical cancer elimination goal.

Founder & CEO: John Muhammadi, M.D., MBA
Contact: info@cervixel.com
Address: Kastonu gatve 4, 01107, Vilnius, Lithuania

## Pillar pages

- https://cervixel.com/ — Homepage: company overview, mission, CervixScan product teaser, and service lines
- https://cervixel.com/products/cervixscan — CervixScan product page: CRISPR-based cervical cancer rapid diagnostic test, preorder information, regulatory status
- https://cervixel.com/about — About Cervixel: founding story, team, university affiliations, awards, mission
- https://cervixel.com/contact — Contact page: address, phone, email, contact form

## Service pages

- https://cervixel.com/services — Services overview: five biotech and medical service lines
- https://cervixel.com/services/regulatory-affairs — Regulatory Affairs & Compliance Consulting
- https://cervixel.com/services/product-development — Biotech & Pharmaceutical Product Development
- https://cervixel.com/services/quality-assurance — Independent Quality Assurance & Product Verification
- https://cervixel.com/services/market-research — Advanced Market Research & Business Intelligence
- https://cervixel.com/services/medical-writing — Professional Medical & Scientific Content Writing

## Blog

- https://cervixel.com/blog — Blog index: articles on cervical cancer, CRISPR diagnostics, regulatory affairs, and industry news
